title: Support redeclaring type as non-type
body:
If a type is re-declared as a non-type this confuses the parser.  E.g. in UVM:

```
  typedef uvm_typed_callbacks#(T) this_type;  // this_type now a type
  ...
  virtual function bit m_am_i_a(uvm_object obj);
    T this_type;  // this_type no longer a type
```

The current parser is context-aware, and this breaks that parsing. Hacks may be possible, but the intent is to mid-term replace the context-aware parser with a non-context aware parser which will solve this problem.
